results.title: Ruling Party Files Four Bills to Follow Up on K-Steel Law
results.description: Korea's ruling Democratic Party has filed four follow-up bills to the K-Steel Law, offering electricity levy exemptions, sub-material tariff relief, and expanded R&D tax support for the steel industry.

results.title: Wheelchair-Bound Devotee from Barpali Has Divine Darshan in Puri
results.description: #ମ ୋର_ଗୋଡ଼_ନାହିଁ #ଲ ାଗିଲା_ଡୋରି_ଆସିଲି_ପୁରୀ ବରପାଲିରୁ ବଡ଼ଦାଣ୍ଡ। ବଡ଼ଦାଣ୍ଡରେ ଦିବ୍ୟାଙ୍ଗ ଭକ୍ତ। ହ୍ୱିଲ୍ ଚେୟାରରେ ବସି ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହିତ କଲେ ଦର୍ଶନ। ତିନି ଠାକୁରଙ୍କ ପାଖରୁ ଦେଖି ଖୁସି ଲାଗିଲା। ଗତ ବର୍ଷ ବାହୁଡାରେ ଆସିଥିଲି, ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ଦେଵ ସ୍ନାନ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମାରେ ଦର୍ଶନ କଲି। କାଳିଆଙ୍କୁ ଦେଖିଲା ପରେ ଭିଡ଼ ଓ ଗରମ ଗୁଳି ଗୁଳି କିଛି ଜଣା ପଡୁନି। #JaiJagannath #Puri #SnanaPurnima #JagannathTemple #DivyangDevotee #BadaDanda #OdishaCulture #SpiritualIndia #HumanInterest_SimanchalBhoi #DevaSnanaPurnima #PuriBadaDanda #JagannathDevotee #DivyangDevotee #JagannathBhakti #SpiritualJourney #PuriFestival #OdishaTV #OTV A differently-abled devotee, Simanchal Bhoi, travelled from Barpali to Puri's Bada Danda to have darshan of Lord Jagannath during Deva Snana Purnima. Arriving in a wheelchair along with family members, the devotee witnessed the divine appearance of the sibling deities and expressed immense joy after receiving darshan. results.title: Kidambi Srikanth Falls Short in US Open Semifinals Against Su Li Yang
results.description: In a gripping semifinal match at the US Open Badminton tournament, former World No. 1 Kidambi Srikanth faced off against Su Li Yang from Chinese Taipei. Despite a valiant effort, Srikanth fell short, extending his wait for a BWF World Tour title since 2017. The match showcased intense competition, with both players exchanging leads before Su ultimately secured victory. Srikanth's sportsmanship was also highlighted during the tournament, making this match a memorable chapter in his career. Discover more about the match dynamics and Srikanth's reflections on his performance.
